mnemonics: Managers Always Need Employees to Manage Salaries (MANETS)
Commission is Often Paid to Most Employees (COPME)
keyPoints: EMPNO is a unique employee number in the database.
Use INSERT INTO statement to add new records in the employee table.
ROLLBACK is used to undo all changes made in the database.
By using ROLLBACK, you can maintain data consistency.
Computation of salary and commission is based on the job type of the employee.
